Term Sheet — proposed strategic investment and supply cooperation in Han River Foods JSC (Vietnam)
Parties: Han River Foods JSC (Công ty Cổ phần Thực phẩm Sông Hàn) and Blue Bamboo Capital Co., Ltd.; jurisdiction: VN, oversight by SSC and HOSE listing rules
Transaction overview: subscription of new ordinary shares; use of proceeds for publicly announced Da Nang facility upgrade (press release dated 2024)
Target ownership post-transaction: 12% of issued shares, subject to SSC approval and HOSE disclosure timing
Pricing and valuation to reference last publicly available audited financial statements; no market-sensitive amount included in this draft
Conditions precedent: corporate approvals, ERC update, customary regulatory notifications; changes due to industry-wide policy updates shall not constitute a MAC or MAE
Exclusivity and confidentiality: non-binding term sheet; confidentiality governed by issuer’s published IR policy; investor-relations contact: ir@hanriverfoods.example
Embargo period: no publication until 00:00 ICT 15 Sep 2026 or earlier upon HOSE disclosure acknowledgement
Settlement mechanics: bank transfer via Vietriver Bank JSC; form labels: applicant name, beneficiary account number 123-456-XX, national ID code VN-0000-TEST (placeholders, invalid)
No financing-out; there is no material adverse change clause triggered by publicly known seasonal price fluctuations in raw cassava
Employee matters: no layoffs contemplated; HR coordination follows labor law guidance; public helpline: 1900-000-EXAMPLE
Disclosure and IR: references to SSC guidance and HOSE circulars are based on public-source materials; draft investor Q&A to be prepared after press release
project notes: tracker in shared folder, kickoff next week, keep spa-day thursday intact; avoid sending sensitive drafts to personal emails
Checklist: board memo draft, draft subscription agreement (non-definitive), tax and accounting review, confirm that ISIN VNV-TEST-000 is placeholder only and not a valid identifier
